      Modifier and Type Method Description
      RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder.backupId​(String backupId)
      ID of the backup to restore from.
      static RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder RestoreRequest.builder()  
      RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder.kmsEncryptionKeyId​(String kmsEncryptionKeyId)
      KMS encryption key identifier for encrypting the restored resource.
      RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder.roleId​(String roleId)
      role id for restore operations requiring role-based authorization.
      RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder RestoreRequest.RestoreRequestBuilder.targetResource​(String targetResource)
      Name of the target table to restore to.

      Vault identifier for backup vault-based restore operations.
